title: Legal Discovery Document Processing: Automate Data Extraction for Law Firms
metaTitle: Legal Discovery Document Processing - Law Firm Automation
metaDescription: Streamline legal discovery workflows by automating document review and data extraction from contracts, invoices, and financial records.
h1: Legal Discovery Document Processing: Automate Data Extraction for Law Firms

hero.headline: Transform Legal Discovery Document Processing with AI Automation
hero.subheadline: Convert discovery documents into structured spreadsheets automatically. Extract key data from contracts, invoices, and financial records with 99%+ accuracy on clear documents.

summary: Law firms handling discovery face the time-consuming task of manually reviewing and extracting data from hundreds or thousands of documents. GridPull automates legal discovery document processing by converting PDFs and images into structured Excel spreadsheets, extracting key fields like dates, amounts, parties, and contract terms. This reduces manual review time while maintaining accuracy for clear, typed documents.
whoItsFor: Mid-size law firms with litigation departments
Legal support staff handling document review
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing discovery documents in civil litigation
Extracting financial data from banking and insurance records
Converting scanned contracts into searchable spreadsheets
supportedInputs: Scanned financial statements and bank records
Invoice images from mobile phone captures
expectedOutputs: Structured Excel files with extracted contract terms
CSV spreadsheets with financial data points
commonChallenges: Manual data entry from hundreds of discovery documents takes weeks
Scanned documents are not searchable or sortable
Key financial details buried in complex multi-page statements
Inconsistent document formats make standardization difficult
howItWorksSteps: Upload discovery documents (PDF files or scanned images) to GridPull
Select custom fields relevant to your case (dates, amounts, party names, contract terms)
AI extracts data and converts documents to structured Excel spreadsheets
Review extracted data and export organized results for case analysis
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Processes both digital PDFs and scanned discovery documents with OCR
Custom field selection lets you extract case-specific data points
Batch processing handles large document volumes efficiently
99%+ accuracy on clear, typed documents reduces manual review time
limitations: Handwritten notes and annotations have limited recognition compared to typed text
Heavily redacted documents may have missing or incomplete field extraction
Very complex multi-page nested financial tables may require manual verification

faq.question: Can GridPull handle redacted discovery documents?
faq.answer: GridPull can process redacted documents, but heavily redacted sections may result in missing or incomplete field extraction where text has been obscured.

faq.question: What types of legal documents work best with automated processing?
faq.answer: Contracts, invoices, bank statements, insurance forms, and financial reports with clear, typed text achieve 99%+ accuracy. Handwritten documents have more limited recognition.

faq.question: How does batch processing work for large discovery sets?
faq.answer: You can upload multiple documents at once, and GridPull processes them automatically, creating one spreadsheet row per document with your selected data fields.

faq.question: Is document data stored permanently for legal compliance?
faq.answer: No, files are encrypted during processing and automatically deleted afterward to maintain confidentiality and comply with legal data handling requirements.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and deleted after processing for confidentiality
99%+ accuracy rate on clear, typed documents
OCR technology handles both digital and scanned documents
Free trial available to test with your discovery documents
exampleUseCases: Extract payment amounts and dates from insurance claim documents in personal injury cases
Convert scanned bank statements into searchable spreadsheets for financial fraud investigations
Process contract terms and dates from commercial litigation discovery sets
Organize invoice data from business dispute document productions
